     the Fermi energy is    -0.3425 ev

!    total energy              =  -10339.97175317 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.14934840 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -10339.82240477 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -221871.11038029 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  111964.36951513 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4254.89977880 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  103823.80690540 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.98866621 Ry

     total magnetization       =    90.01 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    96.14 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  41 iterations
